rationale: This statute governs the date of elections for inter-district agreements under Education Code Subchapter D. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, appraised value, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Any agreement under this subchapter must provide for the ordering of an election to be held on the same date in each district.
_note: Rule text concerns election timing for district agreements; no operative relationship to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
